tasks.subject: Task 1: Global stylesheet and Angular config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `styles.css` with `styles.scss` containing two global layout patterns and update `angular.json`.

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/styles.scss`
- Delete: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/styles.css`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/angular.json`

**Verify:** `cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && ng build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/styles.scss", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/angular.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && ng build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["styles.scss exists", "angular.json references styles.scss", "ng build passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update app component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `app.css` with `app.scss` and remove Tailwind classes from `app.html`.

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.scss`
- Delete: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.css`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.ts`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.html`

**Verify:** `cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && ng build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.scss", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.ts", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/app.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && ng build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app.scss exists", "app.ts references app.scss", "app.html has no Tailwind classes", "ng build passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Remove Tailwind dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/postcss, and postcss from package.json.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/package.json`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/package-lock.json`

**Verify:** `cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && ng build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL
